backend/main.mo: Motoko actor that stores payment records in a map with auto-incrementing IDs, exposing `submitPayment` to add records and `getAllPayments` to return them sorted by full name.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report linking two high-confidence features — fixing AdminPage post-login authentication state detection and ensuring `useGetAllPayments` uses the authenticated actor — to their respective files and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON map of frontend source files to short summaries describing each file's role, used as build planning reference documentation.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS entry file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes including colors, borders, and sidebar tokens.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell with a root div and a module script entry point loading the React app via `src/main.tsx`.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component managing view state between `PaymentPage` and `AdminPage`, passing navigation callbacks as props.
frontend/src/components/AdminLoginGate.t: Centered login gate UI component for the admin panel that shows a lock icon, restricted-access messaging, and an Internet Identity login button with a loading spinner.
frontend/src/components/PaymentForm.tsx: Payment form component with field-level validation, a success confirmation screen, and submission via the `useSubmitPayment` mutation hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous backend actor based on the current Internet Identity, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Context provider and hook implementing Internet Identity authentication via `AuthClient`, exposing identity, login/clear functions, and granular login status flags.
frontend/src/hooks/usePaymentForm.ts: Custom React hook that manages payment form state, input formatting (card number, expiry date), per-field validation, and touched tracking for all payment fields.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Provides React Query hooks for submitting a payment via the backend actor and fetching all payments, with authentication-aware query enabling and cache invalidation.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports fonts, configures Tailwind, defines an oklch-based design token system (neutral and amber palettes), and declares reusable component classes like payment-card, payment-input, and btn-gold.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPage.tsx: Admin dashboard page that gates access behind Internet Identity authentication, then displays a paginated table of all submitted payments with masked card numbers and formatted amounts.
frontend/src/pages/PaymentPage.tsx: Public-facing payment page that renders the PaymentForm component inside a branded layout with a header, trust badges, and a footer including an Admin navigation button.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration that extends the theme with oklch CSS-variable-based color tokens (neutral, amber, semantic), custom border radii, box shadows, and animation keyframes, plus typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks project state (version 13) for a payment submission form web app, listing existing features, known issues (admin panel not displaying full payment details), and architectural notes.
